Home / Services / Emergency Tree Service

Emergency Tree Service

24/7 emergency tree services for storm damage, fallen trees, and other urgent situations.

When a tree emergency strikes, you need a reliable and responsive team to quickly assess the situation and take action to protect your property and safety. The Small World Tree Company offers 24/7 emergency tree services to address storm damage, fallen trees, and other urgent situations. Our experienced crew is equipped to handle any tree emergency, from removing hazardous branches to clearing debris and restoring access to your property.

We understand the stress and anxiety that can accompany a tree emergency, and we are committed to providing prompt and professional service to minimize the impact on your life. We work closely with insurance companies to ensure that your claim is processed smoothly and efficiently. Our emergency services include tree removal, branch removal, debris cleanup, and temporary shoring to stabilize damaged trees.

Don't wait until it's too late. If you have a tree emergency, call The Small World Tree Company immediately. We are here to help you get back on your feet and restore your property to its pre-emergency condition.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency call.
  2. 02 Step 2: Rapid assessment of the situation and development of a plan of action.
  3. 03 Step 3: Safe and efficient removal of hazardous trees and branches.
  4. 04 Step 4: Debris cleanup and property restoration.

Benefits

  • 24/7 availability
  • Rapid response
  • Safety and security
  • Peace of mind

Frequently Asked Questions

What constitutes a tree emergency?

A tree emergency is any situation where a tree poses an immediate threat to your property or safety, such as a fallen tree blocking a driveway or a large branch hanging precariously over your house.

What should I do if a tree falls on my house?

Call 911 if there is a risk of injury. Then, contact your insurance company and The Small World Tree Company to assess the damage and remove the tree.

How quickly can you respond to a tree emergency?

We strive to respond to tree emergencies as quickly as possible, typically within a few hours, depending on the severity of the situation and our current workload.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with emergency tree service? Contact us today.
